creator: doug.rand@dtn.com
text:
Brad, thanks for the work on this. I made some changes to your patch:

* Added coreutils to RUN_DEPENDS so that I could get gtimeout. And tweaked the patch-check_victorops_cmds patch to use it.

* I kept the -a option to psin patch-check_victorops_forwarder to make sure we looked at all processes

* I updated the qpage-patch to VictroOps new style.

Sorry that vacation intruded on getting on to this quickly.

The attached patch orphans some empty patch files that should be removed:

* patch-do_victorops_heartbeat
* patch-enqueue_alert
* patch-forward_alerts
* patch-support_collect.sh
* patch-victorops.cron
